title: Keypad Lock
description: Adds a Keypad lock block, which allows you to use a password for enabling redstone circuitry.
body:
# Keypad block

Adds a block that interacts like a keypad lock, allows the user to input password upto 32 characters of length which then can power blocks/redstone and auto resets after 5 seconds.

- Requires Fabric API

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/n6uV9hKQ8cY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
